wine_bars_late.name: Tastavin
wine_bars_late.address: Calle San Juan 25, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Around 50 wines by the glass on the board, mostly Rioja with premium pours served by Coravin, alongside seasonal small plates
wine_bars_late.tip: Calle San Juan draws the local wine crowd that finds Calle Laurel too touristy; Tastavin is its standard-bearer for serious by-the-glass Rioja.
wine_bars_late.description: The wine-led anchor of Calle San Juan, pouring roughly fifty references by the glass with Coravin for the rarer bottles. The expert local alternative to Laurel.

wine_bars_late.name: Taberna Herrerias
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Herrerias 24, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Around 200 references, mostly classic Riojas served in quality glassware at fair prices, with a ground-floor tapas counter and upstairs dining
wine_bars_late.tip: A family-run old-town tavern for classic Rioja done properly; ask for a Reserva by the glass at the downstairs counter.
wine_bars_late.description: A family-run Casco Viejo tavern with about two hundred mostly classic Rioja references poured in good glassware at reasonable prices.

wine_bars_late.name: El Lagar
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Huesca 13, 26002 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Around 250 selections spanning established Rioja houses, newer small growers and a slice of Spanish and international bottles
wine_bars_late.tip: The breadth here runs from grand old houses to new-wave growers; a good place to taste the two faces of Rioja side by side.
wine_bars_late.description: A wine-focused bar and kitchen with roughly 250 selections, balancing established Rioja names against newer small producers.

wine_bars_late.name: La Tavina
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: About 25 wines by the glass renewed seasonally from regional and international growers, plus a 600-bottle shop across three floors
wine_bars_late.tip: Buy any bottle from the upstairs shop and drink it in the bar for a small corkage; Monday evenings often bring a visiting producer.
wine_bars_late.description: A three-floor wine bar, shop and tasting space at the head of Calle Laurel, with about twenty-five seasonal by-the-glass pours and a 600-bottle cellar.

wine_bars_late.name: Bar Angel
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Laurel 12, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: House Rioja by the glass poured alongside the bar's famous garlic-and-shrimp grilled mushroom pincho
wine_bars_late.tip: Order the champi (grilled mushroom) and a glass of crianza; the garlic-sauce recipe has been a Laurel secret for half a century.
wine_bars_late.description: A half-century institution on Calle Laurel pairing cheap glasses of Rioja with its legendary grilled-mushroom pincho. Pure late-night Logrono tradition.

wine_bars_late.name: Bar Soriano
wine_bars_late.address: Travesia del Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Cheap glasses of house crianza poured with a single, famous mushroom pincho
wine_bars_late.tip: One tapa, one purpose: the buttered garlic mushroom topped with a prawn, washed down with house red.
wine_bars_late.description: An iconic single-pincho mushroom bar on the Laurel, pouring inexpensive house crianza late into the night.

wine_bars_late.name: Bar Torrecilla
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Laurel 15, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: A rotating list of Rioja by the glass matched to modern, creative pinchos
wine_bars_late.tip: One of the more creative kitchens on Laurel; good for a later, more inventive pincho-and-wine stop.
wine_bars_late.description: A modern Calle Laurel bar pairing creative pinchos with a rotating Rioja by-the-glass list, busy late into the evening.

wine_bars_late.name: La Vinoteca
wine_bars_late.address: Calle Laurel 18, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Over 200 references including Rioja, cavas, other sparkling wines and vermouths, with personalised tastings and pairings
wine_bars_late.tip: Broader than most Laurel bars, with cava and vermouth alongside the Rioja; ask about the pairing flights.
wine_bars_late.description: A Calle Laurel wine bar with more than two hundred references across Rioja, cava, sparkling and vermouth, plus guided tastings.

listening_bars.name: Wine Fandango
listening_bars.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
listening_bars.wine_program: Around 100 wines by the bottle and 20 rotating by the glass, plus wine flights, vermouth and porron service
listening_bars.music_format: Afternoon and evening DJ sets that turn the wine bar into Logrono's afterwork session, especially Saturdays
listening_bars.tip: Come for the Saturday afterwork DJ sessions; it is the closest Logrono has to a music-led wine room.
listening_bars.description: A restored 19th-century mansion wine bar on Vara de Rey where DJ sets soundtrack the by-the-glass list. Logrono's most music-forward wine venue.

listening_bars.name: La Tavina (producer listening nights)
listening_bars.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
listening_bars.wine_program: Seasonal by-the-glass program built around visiting-producer evenings
listening_bars.music_format: Monday evening producer sessions and informal music in the ground-floor bar
listening_bars.tip: The Monday producer evenings are part talk, part listening session; arrive early to grab a stool by the counter.
listening_bars.description: On Monday evenings La Tavina turns its ground floor over to visiting growers and informal sessions, a relaxed listening-and-tasting hybrid.

listening_bars.name: Wine Fandango Afterwork
listening_bars.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
listening_bars.wine_program: By-the-glass Rioja and vermouth poured through the afterwork DJ slots
listening_bars.music_format: Curated DJ afterwork sets blending vinyl and digital across the late afternoon into the night
listening_bars.tip: The afterwork format is more about music and a glass in hand than dinner; good for the in-between hours.
listening_bars.description: Wine Fandango's afterwork DJ slot is a music-led way to drink Rioja in central Logrono between the lunch and dinner rushes.

candle_lit.name: Taberna Herrerias (upstairs dining room)
candle_lit.address: Calle Herrerias 24, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
candle_lit.wine_program: Classic Rioja Reservas and Gran Reservas from a 200-strong list in the quiet upstairs room
candle_lit.ambience: Low-lit stone-and-timber upstairs dining room above the busy tapas counter
candle_lit.tip: Escape the downstairs crowd by booking the upstairs room for a slow Gran Reserva over dinner.
candle_lit.description: The hushed upstairs room of this Casco Viejo tavern is the place for a candle-lit Gran Reserva away from the counter scrum below.

candle_lit.name: Wine Fandango (mansion dining room)
candle_lit.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
candle_lit.wine_program: Chef-led tasting menu by Aitor Esnal matched to the by-the-bottle cellar
candle_lit.ambience: Restored 19th-century mansion interior, low light and contemporary design
candle_lit.tip: For a quieter evening skip the DJ hours and book the dining room for the chef menu with cellar pairings.
candle_lit.description: Inside a restored 19th-century mansion, Wine Fandango's dining room is a low-lit setting for chef Aitor Esnal's menu paired from the cellar.

candle_lit.name: Los Canos (Haro)
candle_lit.address: Calle San Bernardo, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
candle_lit.wine_program: Local Rioja list matched to traditional Riojan cooking in a historic stone building
candle_lit.ambience: Original stone walls and wooden beams of a former jail and town hall in Haro
candle_lit.tip: A characterful Haro dinner stop after a day in the Barrio de la Estacion bodegas.
candle_lit.description: Set in Haro's former jail and town hall, Los Canos pairs traditional Riojan cooking with local wine under original stone and timber.

lounges.name: Wine Fandango (lounge and terrace)
lounges.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
lounges.wine_program: Roughly 20 by-the-glass pours plus vermouth and cocktails in the lounge area
lounges.ambience: Design-led mansion lounge near the Espolon, equally a wine bar and an evening hangout
lounges.tip: The lounge side suits a longer sit with vermouth or a glass before dinner near the Espolon park.
lounges.description: Wine Fandango doubles as a design-led lounge near the Espolon, with vermouth, cocktails and by-the-glass Rioja for a slower evening.

lounges.name: La Tavina (upstairs shop lounge)
lounges.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
lounges.wine_program: Any of 600 shop bottles opened for a small corkage and drunk in the calm upstairs space
lounges.ambience: Relaxed first-floor shop-and-lounge above the street-level bar
lounges.tip: The upstairs lounge is the quiet escape from the Laurel; pick a bottle off the shelf and settle in.
lounges.description: La Tavina's first floor doubles as a calm lounge where you can open any of 600 shop bottles for a modest corkage, away from the street bustle.

lounges.name: El Lagar (evening lounge)
lounges.address: Calle Huesca 13, 26002 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
lounges.wine_program: A 250-strong list open by the glass and bottle for unhurried evening drinking
lounges.ambience: Comfortable contemporary room away from the pincho-bar crush
lounges.tip: A calmer alternative to the Laurel for a long evening over several glasses from the deep list.
lounges.description: El Lagar's comfortable room and 250-bottle list make it an easygoing evening lounge for working through Rioja by the glass.

fortified_specialists.name: La Vinoteca (vermouth and fortified bar)
fortified_specialists.address: Calle Laurel 18, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Over 200 references including a vermouth selection alongside cava and Rioja
fortified_specialists.specialty: Spanish vermouth (vermut) and aromatised wines poured by the glass
fortified_specialists.tip: Vermut time is a Logrono ritual; this is one of the few Laurel bars taking its vermouth list seriously.
fortified_specialists.description: Among Calle Laurel's bars, La Vinoteca keeps a genuine vermouth and aromatised-wine list alongside its Rioja and cava, perfect for the local vermut hour.

fortified_specialists.name: La Tienda de la Rica (vermouth counter)
fortified_specialists.address: Avenida de Portugal 15, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
fortified_specialists.wine_program: A specialist shop and counter for vino de municipio and vinedos singulares, with local vermouth poured at the bar
fortified_specialists.specialty: Local Rioja vermouth and aromatised wine at the in-shop counter
fortified_specialists.tip: Logrono licensing limits formal tastings here, but you can still get a small pour of vermouth or wine to know what you are buying.
fortified_specialists.description: A specialist Rioja shop near the Espolon with a small bar counter for vermouth and by-the-glass tasting of village and single-vineyard wines.

late_tastings.name: La Tavina Monday tastings
late_tastings.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
late_tastings.wine_program: Monday-evening guided tastings with regional producers plus weekend tasting courses, drawn from a 600-bottle cellar
late_tastings.format: Producer-led evening tastings and weekend courses
late_tastings.tip: Book ahead for the Monday producer tastings; they are small and fill with locals.
late_tastings.description: La Tavina runs Monday-evening producer tastings and weekend courses, the most consistent late tasting program in central Logrono.

late_tastings.name: Wine Fandango tasting events
late_tastings.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
late_tastings.wine_program: Evening tastings and bodega presentations across the gastronomy-and-wine event calendar
late_tastings.format: Scheduled tastings, producer presentations and DJ afterwork pairings
late_tastings.tip: Check the events calendar; Fandango regularly hosts evening bodega presentations open to the public.
late_tastings.description: Wine Fandango's calendar of evening tastings and bodega presentations makes it a hub for late, structured wine events in Logrono.

late_tastings.name: La Vinoteca pairing tastings
late_tastings.address: Calle Laurel 18, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
late_tastings.wine_program: Personalised tastings and wine-pairing experiences for groups, drawn from 200-plus references
late_tastings.tip: Good for a private group; they will build a pairing flight from the Rioja, cava and vermouth list.
late_tastings.description: La Vinoteca offers personalised pairing tastings for groups from its 200-plus list, a flexible evening option on the Laurel.

late_tastings.name: Tastavin Coravin flights
late_tastings.address: Calle San Juan 25, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
late_tastings.wine_program: Premium and rare Riojas opened by Coravin so they can be poured by the glass into the evening
late_tastings.format: By-the-glass access to high-end bottles via Coravin preservation
late_tastings.tip: Coravin lets Tastavin pour serious bottles by the glass; ask what rare Rioja is open that night.
late_tastings.description: Tastavin uses Coravin to open premium and rare Riojas by the glass, letting you taste seriously aged bottles late without buying the whole bottle.

sparkling_rooms.name: La Vinoteca (cava and sparkling)
sparkling_rooms.address: Calle Laurel 18, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: A cava and sparkling selection within the 200-plus reference list, poured by the glass
sparkling_rooms.specialty: Cava and Spanish sparkling alongside Rioja still wines
sparkling_rooms.tip: One of the few Laurel bars where you can reliably get a glass of cava rather than only still Rioja.
sparkling_rooms.description: La Vinoteca keeps a working cava and sparkling section in its 200-plus list, a rare by-the-glass bubbles option on the Laurel.

sparkling_rooms.name: Wine Fandango (sparkling by the glass)
sparkling_rooms.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Sparkling and cava among the rotating by-the-glass pours, with flights available
sparkling_rooms.specialty: Cava and sparkling served by the glass and in flights
sparkling_rooms.tip: Open an evening with a glass of cava here before moving on to the Rioja flights.
sparkling_rooms.description: Wine Fandango pours cava and sparkling among its rotating by-the-glass selection, a stylish spot for bubbles in central Logrono.

sparkling_rooms.name: La Tavina (sparkling from the shop)
sparkling_rooms.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Cava and sparkling bottles from the 600-strong shop opened for a small corkage in the bar
sparkling_rooms.specialty: Sparkling and cava drunk on-site from the cellar selection
sparkling_rooms.tip: Pick a cava off the shop shelf and have it opened for the corkage fee instead of paying restaurant markups.
sparkling_rooms.description: La Tavina's 600-bottle shop includes cava and sparkling you can open in the bar for a small corkage, a flexible way to drink bubbles on the Laurel.
